sections.paragraph:
ια´ numerical sign = 11th (ἑνδεκάτη) Hm 11 superscr.

Hm Hm = Mandates

superscr. superscr. = superscription

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 464
